init.description: Shell tool initialisations; each guarded, no-ops if the tool isn't installed (see docs/plugins.md for the tool list)

zshrc-wiring.description: Source init.zsh and aliases.zsh from ~/.zshrc (managed block)

bashrc-handoff.description: Hand off to zsh from ~/.bashrc when zsh is installed (guarded, no-op without zsh)
